name: @piflow/e2b
description: Pi Flow ↔ E2B connector — the E2B cloud-sandbox backend for @piflow/core's sandbox seam, packaged as a CHOOSE-TO-INSTALL extension. `npm i @piflow/e2b` and `piflowctl run --sandbox e2b` boots one long-lived E2B Firecracker sandbox per run (per-node workdir subtrees) with OPEN egress by default — the unblock for heterogeneous/remote MCP tools that Daytona's tier-gated egress can't serve.
author: blueif16
